title: Zanthoxylum ovatifoliolatum
intro: Zanthoxylum ovatifoliolatum, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The Chinese prickly ash is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and improve cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Zanthoxylum ovatifoliolatum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and volatile oils, such as limonene and pinene, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the Chinese prickly ash is often used to make herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat a variety of health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
